startup_idea: AI tool for college students to auto-generate notes from lectures

module_1_idea_understanding.idea_summary: An AI tool that automatically generates structured notes from lectures for college students.
module_1_idea_understanding.problem_solved: Students struggle to take comprehensive notes during lectures, often miss key information.
module_1_idea_understanding.unique_value: Provides intelligent, structured, and study-ready notes specifically tailored to academic needs.

module_2_market_demand.recommendation: Strong market opportunity with growing interest in AI-powered education tools.

competitors.name: Otter.ai
competitors.weakness: Limited as a general note-taking app

module_3_competitor_intel.summary: The market is competitive with established players. Differentiation needed in AI summarization.

pain_points: The sync feature is broken, lost my data twice.
This keeps crashing all the time. Terrible experience.
module_4_reddit_sentiment.summary: Mostly positive sentiment. 4 positive vs 2 negative. Users are happy overall, but sync and stability are pain points.

overall_recommendation.next_steps: Focus on reliable sync and crash-free experience to address user pain points found in Reddit sentiment analysis.
